metadata.description: Marketplace for the my-agent-skills suite — a clean PR-workflow skill set for Claude Code, plus standalone design/SEO/writing skills.

plugins.name: mas
plugins.description: my-agent-skills — a clean pull-request workflow suite (verify tasks, review plans, triage findings, fix them, write the PR), plus standalone skills for frontend design, SEO, and humanizing AI text. Every skill is read-only for git. Pairs with compound-engineering-plugin.
